prompt: A vertical ultra-photorealistic cinematic portrait in 9:13 aspect ratio of a young handsome man with dark styled hair, sharp jawline, and defined features standing confidently in a dense misty forest at golden hour, facing the camera with a relaxed fearless warm smile. Dappled golden sunlight streams through tall tree trunks and mist, rim-lighting the lion’s mane, catching the man’s jawline and jacket texture, with mossy forest ground, ferns, and background trees softly blurred by cinematic depth of field. Low slight-angle composition, powerful emotional mood, realistic anatomy and scale, detailed fur, leather grain, natural skin tones, warm cinematic color grading, 8K realism. Add a subtle minimal OzairAI watermark worn naturally into the jacket collar, no other text overlays.
